# Creation Log: Systematic Debugging

Reference for extracting a discipline skill.

Source: personal debugging rules: investigate root cause, pattern, hypothesis, implement.

Kept:
- four phases
- iron law against symptom fixes
- anti-shortcut red flags
- failure-after-fix loop

Dropped:
- project-specific context
- repeated rationale
- narrative examples

Bulletproofing:
- bright-line MUST/NEVER
- phase gate before fixes
- single hypothesis
- after 3 failed fixes, question architecture
- exact shortcut thoughts as red flags

Tests used:
- academic recall
- time pressure obvious quick fix
- complex uncertainty
- failed first fix

Key lesson: red flags naming the exact tempting shortcut create useful friction.
